name: Portuguese
blurb: European Portuguese, the Portuguese of Portugal. Most apps teach the Brazilian variant; Corlang teaches the real língua de Camões as spoken in Lisboa and Porto: European vocabulary, European grammar (chamo-me, estou a aprender), and the official CAPLE exam path.
paretoSummary: 80% of everyday European Portuguese comes from a small core: the ~600 most frequent words of the Português Fundamental, the present of ser/estar/ter/ir plus regular -AR/-ER/-IR verbs, noun gender with articles and their contractions (do, na, ao, à), the pretérito perfeito for the past, ir + infinitivo for the future, and estar a + infinitivo for what's happening now. Learn the European sounds early (reduced vowels, nasal ão/õe, the sh-sound of final s) and always in fixed phrases. Master this 20% and daily life in Portugal opens up.
